'''Palpatine's transport''' was the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in which [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] came to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to transport [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] home to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after Anakin killed [[Krayn]].

This transport appeared to be the same type as ''[[Benevolent III]]''.

==Appearances==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Palpatine's transport}}
*''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]''
*[[Jedi Quest 4|''Jedi Quest'' 4]]
